task: Negotiate a purchase agreement for Land Rover Defender (Vehicle). The only negotiated term is unit_price_usd. Catalog retail is $63500.00 and wholesale is $51360.00. Product features: Off-road SUV with advanced terrain response system and rugged capabilities. Reference: https://www.landroverusa.com/defender/index.html

agent_a.system_goal: You are the supplier for Land Rover Defender. Maximize unit_price_usd while preserving margin over wholesale cost and closing a deal quickly.

agent_b.system_goal: You are buying Land Rover Defender. Minimize unit_price_usd while staying within budget and trying to close at a realistic market price.
